@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+# leo_robot
+
+Robot ROS packages for Leo Rover. These packages can be run only on the real robot. Not usable for the simulation.
+
+* [leo_robot] - Metapackage for this repository.
+* [leo_bringup] - Scripts and launch files for starting basic Leo Rover functionalities.
+* [leo_fw] - Binary releases of Leo Rover firmware and related utilities.
+
+Visit each package's ROS Wiki page for more information. \
+For more information about the robot, visit [Robots/Leo Rover].
+
+[leo_robot]: http://wiki.ros.org/leo_robot
+[leo_bringup]: http://wiki.ros.org/leo_bringup
+[leo_fw]: http://wiki.ros.org/leo_fw
+[Robots/Leo Rover]: http://wiki.ros.org/Robots/Leo%20Rover

@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.5)
+project(leo_bringup)
+
+find_package(ament_cmake REQUIRED)
+
+install(
+  DIRECTORY
+    launch
+  DESTINATION share/${PROJECT_NAME}
+)
+
+ament_package()

@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@
+<launch version="0.1.1">
+
+  <arg
+    name="model"
+    default="$(find-pkg-share leo_description)/urdf/leo.urdf.xacro"
+    description="Absolute path to robot urdf.xacro file" />
+  <arg name="tf_frame_prefix" default="" />
+
+  <include file="$(find-pkg-share leo_description)/launch/state_publisher.launch.xml">
+    <arg name="model" value="$(var model)" />
+  </include>
+
+  <node pkg="web_video_server"
+    exec="web_video_server" />
+
+  <node name="rosbridge_server"
+    pkg="rosbridge_server"
+    exec="rosbridge_websocket">
+    <param name="unregister_timeout" value="86400" />
+  </node>
+
+  <node pkg="rosapi" exec="rosapi_node">
+    <param name="topics_glob" value="[*]" />
+    <param name="services_glob" value="[*]" />
+    <param name="params_glob" value="[*]" />
+  </node>
+
+</launch>
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -0,0 +1,38 @@
+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<package format="3">
+  <name>leo_bringup</name>
+  <version>0.0.0</version>
+  <description>
+    Scripts and launch files for starting basic Leo Rover functionalities. 
+  </description>
+
+  <maintainer email="support@fictionlab.pl">Fictionlab</maintainer>
+  <author email="blazej@fictionlab.pl">Błażej Sowa</author>
+
+  <license>MIT</license>
+
+  <url type="website">http://wiki.ros.org/leo_bringup</url>
+  <url type="bugtracker">https://github.com/LeoRover/leo_robot/issues</url>
+  <url type="repository">https://github.com/LeoRover/leo_robot</url>
+
+  <buildtool_depend>ament_cmake</buildtool_depend>
+
+  <exec_depend>rosbridge_server</exec_depend>
+  <exec_depend>robot_state_publisher</exec_depend>
+  <exec_depend>geometry_msgs</exec_depend>
+  <exec_depend>sensor_msgs</exec_depend>
+  <exec_depend>xacro</exec_depend>
+  <exec_depend>rosapi</exec_depend>
+
+  <exec_depend>leo_description</exec_depend>
+  <!-- <exec_depend>leo_fw</exec_depend> -->
+
+  <!-- <exec_depend>web_video_server</exec_depend> -->
+  <!-- <exec_depend>raspicam_node</exec_depend> -->
+
+  <export>
+    <build_type>ament_cmake</build_type>
+    <architecture_independent/>
+  </export>
+
+</package>

@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.5)
+project(leo_robot NONE)
+find_package(ament_cmake REQUIRED)
+ament_package()
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<package format="3">
+  <name>leo_robot</name>
+  <version>0.0.0</version>
+  <description>Metapackage of software to install on Leo Rover.</description>
+
+  <maintainer email="support@fictionlab.pl">Fictionlab</maintainer>
+  <author email="blazej@fictionlab.pl">Błażej Sowa</author>
+
+  <license>MIT</license>
+
+  <url type="website">http://wiki.ros.org/leo_robot</url>
+  <url type="bugtracker">https://github.com/LeoRover/leo_robot/issues</url>
+  <url type="repository">https://github.com/LeoRover/leo_robot</url>
+
+  <buildtool_depend>ament_cmake</buildtool_depend>
+
+  <exec_depend>leo_bringup</exec_depend>
+  <!-- <exec_depend>leo_fw</exec_depend> -->
+
+  <exec_depend>leo</exec_depend>  
+
+  <export>
+    <build_type>ament_cmake</build_type>
+    <architecture_independent/>
+  </export>
+</package>

data.author: Bitterisland6
data.message:
Add leo_system script (#2)

* added ros2 implementation of leo_system script and added node to the launch file

Signed-off-by: Bitterisland6 <bitterisland6@gmail.com>

* added scripts directory with leo_system script

Signed-off-by: Bitterisland6 <bitterisland6@gmail.com>

* added installation of leo_system script

* fixed type errors, and changed deprecated qos policy to current one

* removed debug prints

* removed ament_lint_cmake errors for CMakeLists file

* removed name errors in leo_bringup launch file

* fixed reboot and shutdown callbacks

files.patch:
@@ -10,4 +10,12 @@ install(
   DESTINATION share/${PROJECT_NAME}
 )
 
+install(
+  PROGRAMS
+    scripts/leo_system
+  DESTINATION lib/${PROJECT_NAME}
+)
+
+
+
 ament_package()

@@ -37,4 +37,7 @@
     <param from="$(find-pkg-share leo_bringup)/config/v4l2_camera.yaml" />
   </node>
 
+  <node pkg="leo_bringup"
+        exec="leo_system"/>
+
 </launch>
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -0,0 +1,56 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env python3
+
+import os
+
+import rclpy
+from rclpy.node import Node
+from rclpy.qos import QoSProfile, QoSDurabilityPolicy
+from std_msgs.msg import Empty
+from std_msgs.msg import String
+
+
+class LeoSystem(Node):
+    def __init__(self):
+        super().__init__("leo_system")
+        self.reboot_sub = self.create_subscription(
+            Empty, "system/shutdown", self.shutdown_callback, 1
+        )
+        self.shutdown_sub = self.create_subscription(
+            Empty, "system/reboot", self.reboot_callback, 1
+        )
+        self.publish_namespace()
+        self.get_logger().info("Leo system node started!")
+
+    def reboot_callback(self, data):
+        self.get_logger().info("Reboot command invoked")
+        os.system("systemctl reboot")
+
+    def shutdown_callback(self, data):
+        self.get_logger().info("Shutdown command invoked")
+        os.system("systemctl poweroff")
+
+    def publish_namespace(self):
+        latching_qos = QoSProfile(
+            depth=1,
+            durability=QoSDurabilityPolicy.TRANSIENT_LOCAL,
+        )
+        namespace_pub = self.create_publisher(
+            String, "robot_namespace", qos_profile=latching_qos
+        )
+        namespace = self.get_namespace()
+        msg = String()
+        msg.data = namespace
+        namespace_pub.publish(msg)
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    rclpy.init()
+    leo_system = LeoSystem()
+
+    try:
+        rclpy.spin(leo_system)
+    except KeyboardInterrupt as exception:
+        leo_system.get_logger().info("Got Ctrl+C, shuting down.")
+        leo_system.destroy_node()
+    finally:
+        rclpy.shutdown()
